title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people decorating a classroom. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Three students are decorating a classroom for a celebration. One student is putting up colourful paper decorations while the others are arranging cards on a table. There are chairs, books and a large window in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people ice skating. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two friends are ice skating at an outdoor rink. They are wearing warm coats, hats and gloves, and one of them is helping the other to balance. There are other skaters and winter lights in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
